error_message: cannot assign twice to immutable variable `coroutine_id`
error_snippet:
|
119 | coroutine_id = idx as i32;
    | ------------------------- first assignment to `coroutine_id`
...
128 | coroutine_id = (s.nco % s.cap) as i32;
    | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ cannot assign twice to immutable variable
    |
help: consider making this binding mutable
    |
103 | let mut coroutine_id: i32;
    |     +++

error_message: cannot borrow `s` as mutable more than once at a time
error_snippet:
|
144 | if let Some(ref mut co) = s.co[id_usize] {
    |                           - first mutable borrow occurs here
...
147 | (co.func)(&mut s, &mut *co.data);
    |           ^^^^^^  ------------- first borrow later used here
    |           |
    |           second mutable borrow occurs here
